top_signals.title: Kuwait Offers Oil to Asian Buyers for First Time Since War Began
top_signals.summary: Kuwait is offering to sell its crude to refiners in Asia for the first time since the Iran war started, the latest indication that oil flows from Persian Gulf producers are opening up despite Tehran’s threat to shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US must learn lessons from Ukraine, innovate faster and cheaper: Anduril president
top_signals.summary: Anduril President Christian Brose discussed the need to develop cheaper weapons systems at scale to avoid quick depletion of exquisite munitions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Treasury Yields Tick Higher as Markets Watch Middle East, U.S. Rates - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Treasury Yields Tick Higher as Markets Watch Middle East, U.S. Rates  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Small-Business Optimism Falls to Lowest Since October 2024
top_signals.summary: An index of US small business optimism fell in May to the lowest level since October 2024, erasing almost all of the gains seen since President Donald Trump was elected for a second term.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Speech At EMERGE Financial Health 2026 Scaling Progress, Shaping the Future, Atlanta, Georgia

top_signals.title: Nuvalent shares surge 39% after UK's GSK agrees to buy the drugmaker for $10.6 billion
top_signals.summary: The deal comes at a time of biotech dealmaking frenzy, driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets and drugmakers' race to bolster pipelines.
